metadata.description: Solidity smart contract development and BattleChain tools

plugins.name: solidity
plugins.description: Production-grade Solidity development standards covering code quality, testing patterns, security practices, and Foundry workflows

plugins.name: battlechain
plugins.description: Reference for BattleChain, the pre-mainnet L2 for battle-testing smart contracts with real funds. Covers deploying contracts, Safe Harbor agreements, whitehat attack workflows, and contract lifecycle management

plugins.name: battlechain-tutorial
plugins.description: Interactive deployment wizard that walks you through preparing your Foundry project for BattleChain. Generates deployment scripts and Safe Harbor agreements
